statement.informal: `infusion_pid_step` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (abs(error) <= ERR_MAX ∧ abs(integral) <= I_LIMIT_MAX ∧ abs(derivative) <= ERR_MAX ∧ kp >= 0.0 ∧ kp <= KP_MAX ∧ ki >= 0.0 ∧ ki <= KI_MAX ∧ kd >= 0.0 ∧ kd <= KD_MAX ∧ integral_limit >= 0.0 ∧ integral_limit <= I_LIMIT_MAX ∧ rate_max >= 0.0 ∧ rate_max <= RATE_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
